why.t: 大氣壓力支撐的是液柱的「垂直高度」。只要外界大氣壓力不變，無論管子如何傾斜，液面到管內頂端的垂直距離都會維持固定（例如 76 cm），只是管內水銀的長度會變長。

why.en: Atmospheric pressure supports the 'vertical height' of the liquid column. As long as the external atmospheric pressure remains constant, no matter how the tube is tilted, the vertical distance from the surface to the top of the liquid inside remains fixed (e.g., 76 cm), only the length of the mercury inside the tube increases.

question.t: 一艘輪船靜止浮在海面上，若輪船的總重量為 W，其受到的浮力為 B，則下列關係何者正確？
question.c: 一艘轮船静止浮在海面上，若轮船的总重量为 W，其受到的浮力为 B，则下列关系何者正确？

question.en: A ship is floating motionless on the sea surface. If the total weight of the ship is W and the buoyancy it receives is B, which of the following relationships is correct?

options.z: B ㄉㄚˋ ㄩˊ W

options.p: B xiao yu W

why.t: 對於任何「浮體」（浮在液面上的物體），其所受的浮力大小必等於物體自身的總重量，即 $B = W$。這是浮體平衡的基本條件。
why.c: 对于任何“浮体”（浮在液面上的物体），其所受的浮力大小必等于物体自身的总重量，即 $B = W$。这是浮体平衡的基本条件。
why.p: dui yu ren he fu ti（fu zai ye mian shang de wu ti），qi suo shou de fu li da xiao bi deng yu wu ti zi shen de zong zhong liang，ji B deng yu W。zhe shi fu ti ping heng de ji ben tiao jian。
why.z: ㄉㄨㄟˋ ㄩˊ ㄖㄣˋ ㄏㄜˊ「ㄈㄨˊ ㄊㄧˇ」（ㄈㄨˊ ㄗㄞˋ ㄧㄝˋ ㄇㄧㄢˋ ㄕㄤˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄨˋ ㄊㄧˇ），ㄑㄧˊ ㄙㄨㄛˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄚˋ ㄒㄧㄠˇ ㄅㄧˋ ㄉㄥˇ ㄩˊ ㄨˋ ㄊㄧˇ ㄗˋ ㄕㄣ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄗㄨㄥˇ ㄓㄨㄥˋ ㄌㄧㄤˋ，ㄐㄧˊ B = W。ㄓㄜˋ ㄕˋ ㄈㄨˊ ㄊㄧˇ ㄆㄧㄥˊ ㄏㄥˊ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄐㄧ ㄅㄣˇ ㄊㄧㄠˊ ㄐㄧㄢˋ。
why.en: For any 'floating body' (an object floating on a liquid surface), the magnitude of buoyancy it receives must equal the object's total weight, i.e., $B = W$. This is the basic condition for floating equilibrium.

question.t: 小明用 10 kgw 的水平力推一個重 50 kgw 的箱子，但箱子紋絲不動。請問此時箱子受到的摩擦力大小與種類為何？
question.c: 小明用 10 kgw 的水平力推一个重 50 kgw 的箱子，但箱子纹丝不动。请问此时箱子受到的摩擦力大小与种类为何？
question.p: xiao ming yong shi kgw de shui ping li tui yi ge zhong wu shi kgw de xiang zi，dan xiang zi wen si bu dong。qing wen ci shi xiang zi shou dao de mo ca li da xiao yu zhong lei wei he？

question.en: Xiao Ming pushes a 50 kgw box with a horizontal force of 10 kgw, but the box does not move at all. What are the magnitude and type of friction acting on the box at this moment?

options.p: shi kgw，jing mo ca li
options.z: 10 kgw，ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ

options.p: wu shi kgw，jing mo ca li
options.z: 50 kgw，ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ

options.p: shi kgw，dong mo ca li
options.z: 10 kgw，ㄉㄨㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ

options.p: wu shi kgw，zui da jing mo ca li
options.z: 50 kgw，ㄗㄨㄟˋ ㄉㄚˋ ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ

why.t: 當物體受外力推動但保持靜止時，物體受到的是「靜摩擦力」。根據力平衡原理，靜摩擦力的大小等於外力的大小，與物重無關。因此摩擦力 = 推力 = 10 kgw。
why.c: 当物体受外力推动但保持静止时，物体受到的是“静摩擦力”。根据力平衡原理，静摩擦力的大小等于外力的大小，与物重无关。因此摩擦力 = 推力 = 10 kgw。
why.p: dang wu ti shou wai li tui dong dan bao chi jing zhi shi，wu ti shou dao de shi jing mo ca li。gen ju li ping heng yuan li，jing mo ca li de da xiao deng yu wai li de da xiao，yu wu zhong wu guan。yin ci mo ca li deng yu tui li deng yu shi kgw。
why.z: ㄉㄤ ㄨˋ ㄊㄧˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄨㄞˋ ㄌㄧˋ ㄊㄨㄟ ㄉㄨㄥˋ ㄉㄢˋ ㄅㄠˇ ㄔˊ ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄓˇ ㄕˊ，ㄨˋ ㄊㄧˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄠˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄕˋ「ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ」。ㄍㄣ ㄐㄩˋ ㄌㄧˋ ㄆㄧㄥˊ ㄏㄥˊ ㄩㄢˊ ㄌㄧˇ，ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄉㄚˋ ㄒㄧㄠˇ ㄉㄥˇ ㄩˊ ㄨㄞˋ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄉㄚˋ ㄒㄧㄠˇ，ㄩˇ ㄨˋ ㄓㄨㄥˋ ㄨˊ ㄍㄨㄢ。ㄧㄣ ㄘˇ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ = ㄊㄨㄟ ㄌㄧˋ = 10 kgw。
why.en: When an object is pushed by an external force but remains stationary, it experiences 'static friction'. According to the principle of force equilibrium, the magnitude of static friction equals the magnitude of the external force and is independent of the object's weight. Therefore, friction = pushing force = 10 kgw.

question.t: 將質量皆為 100g 的木塊與鐵塊同時投入水中，已知木塊浮在水面上，而鐵塊沉入水底，請問兩者受到的浮力大小關係為何？
question.c: 将质量皆为 100g 的木块与铁块同时投入水中，已知木块浮在水面上，而铁块沉入水底，请问两者受到的浮力大小关系为何？
question.p: jiang zhi liang jie wei yi bai ke de mu kuai yu tie kuai tong shi tou ru shui zhong，yi zhi mu kuai fu zai shui mian shang，er tie kuai chen ru shui di，qing wen liang zhe shou dao de fu li da xiao guan xi wei he？
question.z: ㄐㄧㄤ ㄓˊ ㄌㄧㄤˋ ㄐㄧㄝ ㄨㄟˊ ㄧˋ ㄅㄞˇ ㄎㄜˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄇㄨˋ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄩˇ ㄊㄧㄝˇ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄊㄨㄥˊ ㄕˊ ㄊㄡˊ ㄖㄨˋ ㄕㄨㄟˇ ㄓㄨㄥ，ㄧˇ ㄓ ㄇㄨˋ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄈㄨˊ ㄗㄞˋ ㄕㄨㄟˇ ㄇㄧㄢˋ ㄕㄤˋ，ㄦˊ ㄊㄧㄝˇ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄔㄣˊ ㄖㄨˋ ㄕㄨㄟˇ ㄉㄧˇ，ㄑㄧㄥˇ ㄨㄣˋ ㄌㄧㄤˇ ㄓㄜˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄠˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄚˋ ㄒㄧㄠˇ ㄍㄨㄢ ㄒㄧˋ ㄨㄟˊ ㄏㄜˊ？
question.en: A wooden block and an iron block, both with a mass of 100g, are thrown into water. The wooden block floats on the surface, while the iron block sinks to the bottom. What is the relationship between the buoyancy forces they experience?

options.en: (A) The wooden block receives greater buoyancy

options.p: tie kuai shou dao de fu li jiao da
options.z: ㄊㄧㄝˇ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄠˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄐㄧㄠˋ ㄉㄚˋ
options.en: (B) The iron block receives greater buoyancy

options.p: liang zhe shou dao de fu li xiang deng
options.z: ㄌㄧㄤˇ ㄓㄜˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄠˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄒㄧㄤ ㄉㄥˇ

options.p: wu fa bi jiao

why.t: 對於浮體（木塊），浮力等於物體重量（B = W = 100gw）；對於沉體（鐵塊），浮力小於物體重量（B < W）。因此木塊受到的浮力大於鐵塊。
why.c: 对于浮体（木块），浮力等于物体重量（B = W = 100gw）；对于沉体（铁块），浮力小于物体重量（B < W）。因此木块受到的浮力大于铁块。
why.p: dui yu fu ti mu kuai，fu li deng yu wu ti zhong liang；dui yu chen ti tie kuai，fu li xiao yu wu ti zhong liang。yin ci mu kuai shou dao de fu li da yu tie kuai。
why.z: ㄉㄨㄟˋ ㄩˊ ㄈㄨˊ ㄊㄧˇ（ㄇㄨˋ ㄎㄨㄞˋ），ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄥˇ ㄩˊ ㄨù ㄊㄧˇ ㄓㄨㄥˋ ㄌㄧㄤˋ（B = W = 100gw）；ㄉㄨㄟˋ ㄩˊ ㄔㄣˊ ㄊㄧˇ（ㄊㄧㄝˇ ㄎㄨㄞˋ），ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄒㄧㄠˇ ㄩˊ ㄨù ㄊㄧˇ ㄓㄨㄥˋ ㄌㄧㄤˋ（B < W）。ㄧㄣ ㄘˇ ㄇㄨˋ ㄎㄨㄞˋ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄠˋ ㄉㄜ˙ ㄈㄨˊ ㄌㄧˋ ㄉㄚˋ ㄩˊ ㄊㄧㄝˇ ㄎㄨㄞˋ。
why.en: For a floating body (wood), buoyancy equals the object's weight (B = W = 100gw); for a sinking body (iron), buoyancy is less than the object's weight (B < W). Therefore, the buoyancy on the wooden block is greater than that on the iron block.

why.en: Acetic acid (commonly known as vinegar) is an organic acid that dissociates hydrogen ions in water, making it an electrolyte. Ethanol (alcohol), glucose, and esters are organic compounds but do not dissociate in water, so they cannot conduct electricity.

why.c: 大气压力支撑的是液柱的「垂直高度」，与玻璃管的粗细或倾斜角度无关。只要外界大气压力不变，垂直高度差就会维持 76 cm（虽然管内水银长度会变长）。

why.en: Atmospheric pressure supports the 'vertical height' of the liquid column, regardless of the thickness or tilt angle of the glass tube. As long as the external atmospheric pressure remains constant, the vertical height difference will remain 76 cm (although the length of mercury inside the tube will increase).

why.t: 肥皂分子一端為親油端（長碳鏈），可吸附油汙；另一端為親水端（帶電荷），可被水帶走。這種結構使油汙能被水沖洗掉。
why.c: 肥皂分子一端为亲油端（长碳链），可吸附油污；另一端为亲水端（带电荷），可被水带走。这种结构使油污能被水冲洗掉。

why.en: One end of a soap molecule is lipophilic (long carbon chain) and attaches to oil; the other end is hydrophilic (charged) and is carried away by water. This structure allows oil stains to be washed away by water.

options.p: shi gong jin zhong

why.t: 當物體靜止不動時，所受的「靜摩擦力」會等於「外力」。小明推 10 kgw 沒推動，表示摩擦力剛好抵銷推力，故摩擦力為 10 kgw（尚未達到最大靜摩擦力 20 kgw）。
why.c: 当物体静止不动时，所受的「静摩擦力」会等于「外力」。小明推 10 kgw 没推动，表示摩擦力刚好抵销推力，故摩擦力为 10 kgw（尚未达到最大静摩擦力 20 kgw）。
why.p: dang wu ti jing zhi bu dong shi，suo shou de jing mo ca li hui deng yu wai li。xiao ming tui shi gong jin zhong mei tui dong，biao shi mo ca li gang hao di xiao tui li，gu mo ca li wei shi gong jin zhong shang wei da dao zui da jing mo ca li er shi gong jin zhong。
why.z: ㄉㄤ ㄨù ㄊㄧˇ ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄓˇ ㄅㄨˊ ㄉㄨㄥˋ ㄕí，ㄙㄨㄛˇ ㄕㄡˋ ㄉㄜ˙「ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ」ㄏㄨㄟˋ ㄉㄥˇ ㄩˊ「ㄨㄞˋ ㄌㄧˋ」。ㄒㄧㄠˇ ㄇㄧㄥˊ ㄊㄨㄟ 10 kgw ㄇㄟˊ ㄊㄨㄟ ㄉㄨㄥˋ，ㄅㄧㄠˇ ㄕˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ ㄍㄤ ㄏㄠˇ ㄉㄧˇ ㄒㄧㄠ ㄊㄨㄟ ㄌㄧˋ，ㄍㄨˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ ㄨㄟˊ 10 kgw（ㄕㄤˋ ㄨㄟˋ ㄉㄚˊ ㄉㄠˋ ㄗㄨㄟˋ ㄉㄚˋ ㄐㄧㄥˋ ㄇㄛˊ ㄘㄚ ㄌㄧˋ 20 kgw）。
why.en: When an object is stationary, the 'static friction' it experiences equals the 'external force'. Since Xiao Ming pushed with 10 kgw and it didn't move, the friction exactly cancels out the push, so the friction is 10 kgw (it has not yet reached the maximum static friction of 20 kgw).

why.en: Soap molecules consist of a long-chain "hydrophobic end" (hydrocarbon chain) and a charged "hydrophilic end." The hydrophobic end inserts itself into the grease, while the hydrophilic end stays in the water, allowing the water to surround and wash away the grease.

why.t: 酸與醇反應會產生「酯類」與水，此過程稱為酯化反應。酯類通常具有水果香味（如乙酸乙酯），且密度比水小、難溶於水，會浮在水面上。
why.c: 酸与醇反应会产生「酯类」与水，此过程称为酯化反应。酯类通常具有水果香味（如乙酸乙酯），且密度比水小、难溶于水，会浮在水面上。

why.en: The reaction between acid and alcohol produces "esters" and water, a process called esterification. Esters usually have a fruity fragrance (like ethyl acetate), are less dense than water, are insoluble in water, and float on the surface.
